subcodes.first_line: O Thou Who dost adorn the sacred Beauty of Thine eternity with the ornament of the thread of Thy glorious bounty, and dost manifest the dawning-places of the Sun of Thy countenance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تزین جمال قدس ازلیتک بطراز خیط عز مکرمتک و تظهر ظهورات شمس وجهتک
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @presence of; reunion with God, @symbolism, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
